title: Regenerating Dragon Egg│再生成龍蛋
description: Every time an Ender Dragon is killed, it will generating a dragon egg.│末影龍每次被擊殺之後都會生成一個龍蛋。
body:
⚠️ This data pack requires the data pack [Ender Dragon Loot](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ender-dragon-loot).│該資料包需要資料包[末影龍戰利品](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ender-dragon-loot)。 ⚠️
# Introduce│介紹
A dragon egg is not only generated the first time the ender dragon is killed, but a dragon egg is generated every time the ender dragon is killed.│龍蛋不只是在第一次擊殺末影龍時生成，而是每次擊殺末影龍都會生成一個龍蛋。
